59752.name: Will to Survive
59752.description: Will to Survive Removes all stun effects.

20594.name: Stoneform
20594.description: Stoneform Removes all harmful Poison, Disease, Curse, Magic, and Bleed effects and reduces all physical damage taken by 10 % for 8 sec.

65116.name: Stoneform
65116.description: Stoneform Removes all poison, disease and bleed effects and reduces all physical damage taken by 10% for 8 sec.

58984.name: Shadowmeld
58984.description: Shadowmeld Activate to slip into the shadows, reducing the chance for enemies to detect your presence. Lasts until cancelled or upon moving. Any threat is restored versus enemies still in combat upon cancellation of this effect.

20589.name: Escape Artist
20589.description: Escape Artist Escape the effects of any immobilization or movement speed reduction effect.

28880.name: Gift of the Naaru
28880.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Warrior Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59542.name: Gift of the Naaru
59542.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Paladin Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59543.name: Gift of the Naaru
59543.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Hunter Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59544.name: Gift of the Naaru
59544.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Priest Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59545.name: Gift of the Naaru
59545.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Death Knight Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59547.name: Gift of the Naaru
59547.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Shaman Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59548.name: Gift of the Naaru
59548.description: Gift of the Naaru Requires Mage Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

68992.name: Darkflight
68992.description: Darkflight Activates your true form, increasing current movement speed by an additional 40% for 10 sec.

68996.name: Two Forms
68996.description: Two Forms Turn into your currently inactive form.

256948.name: Spatial Rift
256948.description: Spatial Rift Tear a rift in space. Reactivate this ability to teleport through the rift.

255647.name: Light's Judgment
255647.description: Light's Judgment Call down a strike of Holy energy, dealing [Attack Power * 4.2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Holy damage to enemies within 10 yards after 3 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

265221.name: Fireblood
265221.description: Fireblood Dark Iron Dwarf Racial Removes all poison, disease, curse, magic, and bleed effects and increases your primary stat by ( 84 * 3) and an additional 84 for each effect removed. Lasts 8 sec.

265225.name: Mole Machine
265225.description: Mole Machine While outdoors, summon a Mole Machine that tunnels through the earth.

287712.name: Haymaker
287712.description: Haymaker Wind up, then unleash your might upon your foe, dealing [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, stunning for 3 sec, and knocking them back substantially.

312924.name: Hyper Organic Light Originator
312924.description: Hyper Organic Light Originator Summon Organic Light duplicates to distract your foes for 15 sec.

33697.name: Blood Fury
33697.description: Blood Fury Orc Racial Increases your attack power and Intellect by 169 for 15 sec.

7744.name: Will of the Forsaken
7744.description: Will of the Forsaken Removes any Charm, Fear and Sleep effect.

20549.name: War Stomp
20549.description: War Stomp Stuns up to 5 enemies within 8 yds for 2 sec.

26297.name: Berserking
26297.description: Berserking Increases your haste by 10% for 12 sec.

28730.name: Arcane Torrent
28730.description: Arcane Torrent Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 3% of your Mana.

50613.name: Arcane Torrent
50613.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Death Knight Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore .

69179.name: Arcane Torrent
69179.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Warrior Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and increase your Rage by 15.

80483.name: Arcane Torrent
80483.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Hunter Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 15 of your Focus.

129597.name: Arcane Torrent
129597.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Monk Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore .

155145.name: Arcane Torrent
155145.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Paladin Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore .

202719.name: Arcane Torrent
202719.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Demon Hunter Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and generate .

232633.name: Arcane Torrent
232633.description: Arcane Torrent Requires Priest Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 3% of your mana .

69041.name: Rocket Barrage
69041.description: Rocket Barrage Goblin Racial Launches your belt rockets at an enemy, dealing [(42.9% of Spell Power + 50% of Attack Power) + 90 * 2] fire damage.

69070.name: Rocket Jump
69070.description: Rocket Jump Activates your rocket belt to jump forward.  Other effects which slow the rate of falling cannot be used within 10 sec after using this ability.

260364.name: Arcane Pulse
260364.description: Arcane Pulse Deals (Attack Power * 1.5) Arcane damage to nearby enemies and reduces their movement speed by 80%. Lasts 8 sec.

255654.name: Bull Rush
255654.description: Bull Rush Charge forward for 1 sec, knocking enemies down for 1.5 sec.

274738.name: Ancestral Call
274738.description: Ancestral Call Mag'har Orc Racial Invoke the spirits of your ancestors, granting you 225 of one of your two highest secondary stat for 15 sec.

291944.name: Regeneratin'
291944.description: Regeneratin' Channeled () Regenerate 50% of your maximum health over 6 sec, interrupted by direct damage.

312411.name: Bag of Tricks
312411.description: Bag of Tricks Pull your chosen trick from the bag and use it on target enemy or ally. Enemies take [Attack Power * 2.52 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] damage and are snared by 80% for 4 sec, while allies are healed for [Attack Power * 3.78 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and move 20% faster for 4 sec.

107079.name: Quaking Palm
107079.description: Quaking Palm Strikes the target with lightning speed, incapacitating them for 4 sec, and turns off your attack.

357214.name: Wing Buffet
357214.description: Wing Buffet With a powerful flap of your wings, knock away enemies in front of you.

368970.name: Tail Swipe
368970.description: Tail Swipe Requires Evoker Lash out with your tail, knocking enemies within 8 yds into the air.

446280.name: Tier 11
446280.description: Tier 11 [Recommended for adventurers who want an unfathomable challenge.][Recommended for adventurers at item level 136+.][Recommended for adventurers at item level 658+.][Requires completion of a Tier 10 delve with lives remaining.]
